name: Torres del Paine
description: Granite peaks rising above glacial lakes in Chilean Patagonia.

name: Vatnajökull Glacier
description: Europe's largest glacier with dramatic ice caves and black sand beaches.

name: Mount Cook
description: New Zealand's highest peak surrounded by alpine lakes and tussock grasslands.

name: Lofoten Islands
description: Dramatic fishing villages and jagged mountains rising from the Arctic Ocean.

name: Yosemite Valley
description: Iconic granite domes and waterfalls in California's Sierra Nevada.
